scores.notes: Key issues: Company name misspelled ('MR D. T. Y. SM1 SUN 000' vs 'MR D.I.Y. (M) SDN BHD'), address has minor errors ('1051-B' vs '1851-B', 'BALAFONG' vs 'BALAKONG'). Numeric values are mostly correct but invoice items clutter the output. Layout is somewhat preserved but includes irrelevant invoice details.
